body:
Point-to-point meetings are organised by Hunts and some other clubs, such as armed forces and university riding clubs. In the 2011/12 season it appears that there were around 200 point-to-point meetings on over 100 courses, with attendances of up to several thousand spectators.

The following guidance covers:

BIM24775

Trading?

BIM24780

Dealings with members
title: Meaning of trade: mutual trading and members clubs: mutual associations: specific activities: Hunt point to point meetings - introduction and layout of guidance
